_comment: Layer 2 RAG quality thresholds. Enforced values are set at baseline-5pp after first calibration run. See TestPlan §5 Layer 2 for calibration process.
calibration_note: Run: python rag_eval/eval_runner.py --calibrate  to measure baseline and set enforced thresholds at baseline-5pp per metric.

targets._comment: Long-term targets from TestPlan. Tighten enforced values toward these quarterly.

context_metrics_enforced._comment: Activated only when the FitCoach API exposes retrieved_contexts in the SSE done event. Currently disabled — context_metrics_active=false.
